# Vendored: fal-ai-media

Bundled copy of the `fal-ai-media` skill so this repo runs without an external Skills install.
Source: https://github.com/marlandoj/zo-skills (or `/home/workspace/Skills/fal-ai-media/` on Zo).

## Install

```bash
cd scripts/vendor/fal-ai-media
bun install
```

Set `FAL_KEY` in your environment (or in Zo Secrets at Settings > Advanced).
